features.name: Project Scaffold and Core Setup
features.description: Complete the Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind project setup. Create React Router, shared constants, remaining UI components, and the @crossref documentation template. The /website folder already exists with basic scaffold — extend it.
steps: Verify /website folder has Vite + React + TS + Tailwind configured, fix any missing config

Set up React Router in src/App.tsx with route definitions for: Overview, Calendar, Customers, Appointments, Services, Payment, Employees, Locations, Website, Settings, Relationships — add @crossref comments
Create src/constants/index.ts with status colors, dental clinic theme colors, and @crossref:used-in[ALL_COMPONENTS]
Create placeholder page components for each route (just title + layout wrapper) so routing works end-to-end
Verify the app builds and runs with 'npm run build' in the /website folder

features.name: Shared Business Components
features.description: Build the reusable shared components used across multiple pages. Each must have @crossref comments.
steps: Build SearchBar component in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[Customers, Employees, Services, Website] — debounced input with search icon
Build DataTable component in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[Customers, Employees, Services, Locations, Reports] — sorting, pagination
Build StatusBadge component in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[Appointments, Services, Calendar, EmployeeTable] — colored status indicator
Build FilterByLocation dropdown in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Calendar, Customers, Appointments, Employees]
Build StatCardModule in src/components/modules/ with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports, LocationDetail] — metric display card with icon and trend

features.name: Shared Selectors and Form Components
features.description: Build selector components and form utilities shared across multiple forms. Each must have @crossref comments.
steps: Build CustomerSelector in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[AppointmentForm, ServiceForm, PaymentForm] — searchable customer dropdown
Build DoctorSelector in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[AppointmentForm, ServiceForm, CalendarFilter] — doctor/employee dropdown
Build LocationSelector in src/components/shared/ with @crossref:used-in[CustomerForm, EmployeeForm, AppointmentForm, ServiceForm] — branch selector
Create form validation hooks in src/hooks/useFormValidation.ts with @crossref:used-in[CustomerForm, EmployeeForm, AppointmentForm]
Build RevenueChartModule in src/components/modules/ with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports] — chart component using recharts or similar

features.name: Overview Dashboard - Stats and Schedule
features.description: Build the main Overview dashboard page with stats cards and today's schedule.
steps: Create src/pages/Overview/index.tsx page component with @crossref:used-in[AppRouter]
Build DashboardStats section using StatCardModule with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports, LocationDashboard]
Build TodaySchedule component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, CalendarPage] showing appointment timeline
Create hooks/useDashboardStats.ts with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports] — fetches mock stats data
Create hooks/useTodaySchedule.ts with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Calendar] — fetches today's appointments

features.name: Overview Dashboard - Actions and Notifications
features.description: Add quick actions, notifications panel, and revenue chart to the Overview page.
steps: Build QuickActionsBar component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Sidebar] — buttons for common actions
Build NotificationsPanel component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Header] — recent alerts list
Integrate RevenueChartModule into Overview page with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports]
Add FilterByLocation to Overview page — state managed with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Calendar, Customers]
Wire up all Overview sections with mock data and verify page renders correctly

features.name: Calendar - Day, Week, and Month Views
features.description: Build the Calendar page with three view modes. Cross-reference with Overview (TodaySchedule) and Appointments.
steps: Create src/pages/Calendar/index.tsx with view mode tabs (Day/Week/Month) and @crossref:uses[DayView, WeekView, MonthView]
Build DayView component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar] showing hourly time slots with appointments
Build WeekView component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar] showing 7-day grid
Build MonthView component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar] showing monthly calendar grid
Build TimeSlot component with @crossref:used-in[CalendarDayView, CalendarWeekView, OverviewTodaySchedule]

features.name: Calendar - Appointments and Interactions
features.description: Add appointment cards, detail modal, drag-and-drop, and filters to Calendar.
steps: Build AppointmentCard component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Overview, Appointments] — displays appointment summary
Build AppointmentDetailsModal with @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Appointments] — shows full appointment info
Add drag-and-drop rescheduling hook with @crossref:used-in[Calendar]
Add FilterByDoctor shared with @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Appointments, Employees]
Add color coding system — constants @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Appointments, Overview] for appointment types
